title: Full debug of terminal subagent grid

log.context: Full debug of terminal subagent grid

The fix is confirmed working. Here's the full diagnosis:

---

**Root cause: Missing CORS header on `/api/subagents`**

The terminal page lives at `terminal.clung.us` and the JS fetches `https://clung.us/api/subagents` — a cross-origin request (different subdomain). Clunger was returning no `Access-Control-Allow-Origin` header on that endpoint, so the browser silently blocked the fetch. No cards rendered.

**All the other checks:**

- `/api/subagents` itself works fine — returns 21 agents from l...(truncated)
